osf_release.release_boundary: The author-linked OSF node is private but readable through the paper's view-only token. OSF reports the node and all listed files as created/last modified before arXiv v1 submission, but the node is not a frozen registration and exposes no paper-time revision identifier. The acquisition is therefore a timestamped local snapshot, not immutable paper-time evidence. Raw tables remain local rather than Git-tracked because the release includes stable pseudonymous IDs plus participant age/job/research-background combinations and the available materials do not establish permission for redistribution beyond view-only research access.
osf_release.scope: The snapshot contains anonymized/pseudonymous study tables, two database-schema SQL files, and four result figures. It does not expose the complete application source, executable analysis scripts promised by the paper, Langfuse traces, study protocol or participant instructions, think-aloud transcripts, qualitative coding records, knowledge-extraction model outputs with independent validation, model configuration/version records, consent form text, or a data dictionary.
osf_release.title: Seedentia: Context-Mediated Domain Adaptation - Evaluation Data

paper.title: Context-Mediated Domain Adaptation in Multi-Agent Sensemaking Systems

scope_note: This manifest establishes primary-source acquisition, extraction, version comparison, and OSF snapshot provenance only. It is not a deep review and makes no claim of tacit-knowledge transfer, expert equivalence, quality improvement, cross-user or cross-domain generalization, privacy adequacy, professional utility, production fitness, or readiness.

version_audit.substantive_study_text_status: No substantive method, result, or limitation change was found in a source-level comparison. The evaluation TeX differs only in the result-figure filename extension; implementation TeX changes screenshot extensions and adds the Langfuse citation. Other changes update publication metadata/copyright, references, formatting macros, and convert seven screenshots from PNG to JPEG.

verification_note: Both immutable PDFs report 34 pages. The complete 136,724-character v2 layout-preserving extraction was inspected across the opening, framework/implementation, exact generation and extraction prompts, study method, participant sequence, metrics, quantitative and qualitative results, limitations, and final references. The extraction is non-empty and coherent; figures, equations, and tables remain more authoritative in PDF/HTML. The arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice at acquisition.
